memory_recovered: Peer coordination has five evidentiary transitions: trigger attempt, scheduler acknowledgement, target enablement, peer execution, and peer artifacts. Evidence for one transition cannot be promoted into another.

claim_states.observed: Schema and disabled-target example exist in repository history.
claim_states.inferred: Unqualified 'triggered' language risks overstating coordination success.
claim_states.proposed: Use structured peer-trigger events for future handoffs.
claim_states.unresolved: No inspected repository evidence proves the example peer later ran.

privacy_boundary: Only public repository files and commit metadata were used. Raw chat, health, pet-health, credentials, contact data, and unreviewed uploads were excluded.
specialist_registry_action: none; existing Decision Historian, Contradiction Resolver, and Privacy Boundary Auditor roles were sufficient

verification.method: GitHub contents API creation followed by exact-path refetch

limits: This record does not prove any peer execution.
The canonical continuity index was not overwritten; the memory unit is additive and awaits later index aggregation.
